levels.name: Service area
levels.blurb: Top orchestrator for a discipline — triages an engagement and routes it to a category lead.

levels.name: Category lead
levels.blurb: Owns a category, sets the strategy, and orchestrates its sub-agents.

levels.name: Sub-agent
levels.blurb: A specific job — produces one typed artifact and dispatches its task agent.

levels.name: Task agent
levels.blurb: One focused task with a deliberately limited toolset.

skills.desc: Business orchestrator: strategy, growth, partnerships, M&A, operations, innovation → routes to its category leads
Partnerships, alliances, BD pipeline, and new revenue lines
Fundraising, financial modeling, M&A, and due diligence
Innovation programs, new ventures, and design-thinking facilitation
Process, org design, operational efficiency, and scaling
Company strategy, vision, OKRs, and planning cycles
Builds a driver-based financial-model (P&L, cash/runway, scenarios); dispatches the valuation task agent
Turns strategic priorities into an okr-set (objectives, owners, key results); dispatches the metric-definer task agent
Maps a ranked opportunity-map (jobs-to-be-done, unmet needs); dispatches the concept-sketcher task agent
Builds a ranked partner-shortlist (fit/effort/value, value exchange); dispatches the partner-researcher task agent
Maps a core process into a process-map (steps, owners, handoffs, bottleneck); dispatches the SOP-writer task agent
Shapes one opportunity into a testable concept — value prop, riskiest assumption, cheapest test (limited tools)
Defines the exact metric for one key result — baseline, target, cadence, source (limited tools)
Researches one candidate partner into a firmographic profile (limited tools)
Writes the runnable SOP for one process step — trigger, actions, owner, checks (limited tools)
Runs one valuation method (DCF/comps/precedents) into a defensible value (limited tools)
Marketing orchestrator: brand, content, growth, events, digital, quant marketing
Positioning, identity, brand architecture, and messaging
Writes SEO articles, applies on-page craft (quality, links, schema, images), and publishes to WordPress, Ghost, or Framer
Channels, web, martech, and digital presence
Events, activations, and experiential marketing
DataForSEO-grounded search acquisition: keyword/competitive/organic/answer-engine research, media plans, and campaign build
Measurement, attribution, MMM, and marketing analytics
Programmatic answer-engine (LLM) discoverability audit → an aeo-audit (AEO Readiness Score, fixes, JSON-LD); dispatches the 5 AEO task agents
Builds an attribution-model (method, ROI by channel, assumptions); dispatches the experiment-designer task agent
Builds a brand-platform (positioning, values, personality, pillars, voice); dispatches the naming task agent
Builds a channel-plan (channel roles, budget split, KPIs); dispatches the funnel-mapper task agent
Builds a content-strategy (pillars, intent, cadence, distribution, measurement); dispatches the content-brief task agent
Paid-social creative strategy (Motion method) → creative-strategy (diagnosis, personas both ways, evidence-ranked roadmap) + scored ad-creative units; dispatches the 4 creative task agents
Builds an event-plan (objective, format, experience beats, budget, KPIs); dispatches the run-of-show task agent
Builds a growth-model (north-star, AARRR funnel + levers, loops, experiment backlog); dispatches the growth-experiment task agent
Recipe-card copy scored to 90+ (Copy-Editor veto) → image-gen prompt; clone + animate modes (limited tools)
7-phase brand extraction → research brief + Brand Spec / Visual Style cards (limited tools)
Cross-references NAP across Yelp/Facebook/directories for errors (limited tools)
Top-10 local-directory consensus share vs competitors (limited tools)
Briefs one topic — angle, keywords, intent, outline, word-count floor, internal links (limited tools)
Spend-gated metric read (thumbstop, hold, retention, CTR) → iterate/scale/kill verdicts (limited tools)
Designs one incrementality test — hypothesis, method, power calc, read-out (limited tools)
Maps one channel's funnel stage by stage — KPI, conversion rate, top lever (limited tools)
Designs one growth experiment — metric, MDE, sample/duration, guardrails, decision rule (limited tools)
Hook boards: generate + grade hooks across the 3 layers for one persona/angle (limited tools)
Generates + screens names for one brief — distinctiveness, domain/trademark risk (limited tools)
Keyword-frequency + sentiment read of public review text (limited tools)
Builds one event's minute-by-minute run-of-show — segments, owners, cues (limited tools)
Drafts the missing JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema template (limited tools)
Scrapes site HTML, verifies JSON-LD LocalBusiness, maps semantic gaps (limited tools)
Sales orchestrator: sales strategy, GTM, account management, sales enablement
Post-sale management, expansion, retention, and QBRs
Launch, ICP, positioning-to-pipeline, and channel strategy
Playbooks, collateral, training, and CRM/process tooling
Revenue model, segmentation, sales motion, and quota/territory
Builds an account-plan (health, stakeholders, risks, expansion path); dispatches the QBR task agent
Builds the ICP (segments, triggers, fit) from market signals; dispatches the lead-list task agent
Builds a sales-playbook (stages, qualification, talk tracks, objections); dispatches the battlecard task agent
Builds a sales-plan (segments, territories, coverage model); dispatches the quota-modeler task agent
Writes one competitor/objection battlecard — their pitch, our wedge, landmines (limited tools)
Sources a target lead/account list for one ICP segment (limited tools)
Builds one account's QBR — value delivered, health, roadmap, the ask (limited tools)
Models one territory's quota bottom-up — capacity, productivity, pipeline coverage (limited tools)
Technology orchestrator: product strategy, AI/ML, software dev+QA, product design, data analytics
Models, ML pipelines, AI features, and evaluations
Instrumentation, dashboards, analysis, and insight delivery
Design lead/orchestrator: creative & art direction (briefs, UX, UI structure & tokens, brand, audits) — and dispatches hands-on work to the claude / figma / canva design sub-agents
Turns any business idea, SOP, or workflow into a complete multi-agent TypeScript/Node system with Coda data layer, test infrastructure, and GitHub CI/CD
Product management end to end: strategy, vision, personas, journey, user stories, PRD, GTM, and metrics → Coda workspace
Web-dev lead/orchestrator: implements the PM + designer outputs as a live site, picking the platform and dispatching to the framer / squarespace sub-agents — and gating publish on the web-qa verifier
Connects to Canva to analyze existing work and create new/on-brand designs via the Canva Connect API
Human-in-the-loop UI design loop that drives claude.ai/design to produce tasteable variants and a code handoff
Connects to Figma to ingest/analyze existing files (REST) and author new design via generated Figma plugin code
Two surfaces — Server-API client builds (layout, React components, CMS, publish) and internal unframer-MCP ops on the firm's live Framer portfolio (grounded in the8genc/design-8gents)
Builds an analytics-model (tracking plan + metric layer); dispatches the dashboard-spec task agent
Specs an ML capability into an ml-spec (data, approach, baseline, metrics); dispatches the eval-harness task agent
Manages a client's Square POS account via the Square Node SDK — catalog, inventory, orders, payments, customers; each client adds their own API keys in a settings/dashboard step
Generates, validates, scores, refines, and persists production-ready PRDs for AINative features and agent capabilities
Develops a Squarespace site: editor build, Custom CSS + code injection, and Commerce APIs for store data
Specs one dashboard for an audience — decision, metrics, comparisons, drill-downs (limited tools)
Designs the eval harness for one model — eval set, metrics, slices, ship bar (limited tools)
Pre-publish QA gate: drives chrome-devtools-mcp + Puppeteer over the staged site — design fidelity, functional flows, console/network, a11y/perf — returns a pass/fail report (limited tools)
